experiences.title: Co-Founder & Global CEO
experiences.description: Charles is the Co-Founder and Global CEO of Executive Channel Holdings Pty Ltd (ECH). ECH owns and operates Executive Channel Europe (UK / France / Belgium), Executive Channel Deutschland, Australian Media Channel (Media i), MI3 Australia and Media EYE France.  Media Eye France is a joint venture with Adwanted Group.

recommendations:
Sean Adams

I first came into contact with Charles many years ago when he was at Buspak and have had the pleasure of working with him a number of times since

Charles is a born leader who has the ability to build strong and cohesive teams around him which I have seen happen at several companies. 

He also has a strong entrepreneurial streak that ensures he is always looking for new opportunities to do things differently

And on top of that, he is one of the Media Industry's good guys - always good company and popular with both colleagues, suppliers and clients alike.
